title: StepID Property
description: This sets or returns the step number so the user understands the task or job progression situation.
notes: This property is used to set or confirm the step ID so the task or job progression situation is understood.
see_also:
Applies To

Robot Object

Reset Property
examples:
Function Test_SetStepID(iStepID As Integer) ' Process to set StepID FSet Robot.StepID, iStepID
Fend

Function Test_GetStepID ' Process to acquire the StepID Integer iStepID Robot.StepID, iStepID Print iStepID
Fend
Function Test_Main ' Main process executing the force control function ･･･ Move P0 FC1 CF Test_SetStepID(1) ' Setting StepID=1 ･･･

Move P1 FC2 CF Test_SetStepID(2) ' Setting StepID=2 ・・・ FSet FS1.Reset Test_SetStepID(3) ' Setting StepID=3 ･･･ Move P3 FC3 CF Test_SetStepID(4) ' Setting StepID=4 ・・・
Fend

Function Test_Sub ' Sub-process which monitors at 5 second intervals Do
   Test_GetStepID
   Wait(5) Loop
Fend
